privileged_info_summary: The generate_sales_report task is a medium-difficulty GUI automation task targeting NCH Copper Point of Sale v3.06 (an unmaintained Australian POS software) on Windows 11. The environment contains 100 synthetic products (from Shopify Partners product-csvs across 5 categories: Clothing, Home & Garden, Jewelry, Grocery, Electronics) and 30 synthetic customers (from datablist sample data with fabricated addresses and emails). The task description claims 'the system has some previously recorded sales transactions', but this claim is unverified - the provided setup scripts do not explicitly create pre-seeded transaction records. All verifiable metadata claims are consistent: timeout 240s, max steps 30, sparse reward type, synthetic data sources, and stub verifier (actual verification delegated to external VLM).
